EX30.recommended_for: People who value individuality, conscious consumption, city living, smart design, personal space, ease of navigation, modern aesthetics, and sustainability. Ideal for weekend getaways, singles, couples, or those with minimalist needs.

19_5.description: These aerodynamic wheels perfectly complement the bold design of your fully electric Volvo. Diamond cut design with contrasting surfaces of polished aluminium and glossy black aero inserts create a distinctive contemporary look. Aerodynamic design and innovative use of synthetic materials also help to lower air resistance and weight which gives you good conditions for optimised energy efficiency and long range.

20_5.description: These larger aerodynamic wheels add a bolder stance to your fully electric Volvo. The 5-spoke diamond cut design with contrasting surfaces of polished aluminium and glossy black aero inserts creates a sporty, contemporary look while maintaining excellent energy efficiency and long range.

20_5y.description: The distinctive Y-spoke design in diamond cut finish gives your fully electric Volvo SUV a dynamic and technical expression. Contrasting surfaces of polished aluminium and glossy black create a unique look, while the aerodynamic design contributes to optimised energy efficiency and long range.

cloud_blue.description: A pure, light solid blue colour with a whitish character, inspired by the cold air of snowy Swedish winter landscapes. This is a playful colour that enhances the graphic impression of your Volvo.

crystal_white.description: Shimmering, sparkling white pearl colour built up by three layers of coat which gives a soft, deep pearlescent effect for a silky, smooth appearance and a pure exclusive look.

onyx_black.description: Elegant, deep black metallic with a brilliant sparkle in strong daylight and a solid darkness in reduced light.

vapour_grey.description: A solid effect metallic in neutral grey with a misty touch, inspired by windswept Scandinavian limestone houses. Gives the car a light, agile look. The solid look turns to light, shimmering metallic in sunlight.

sand_dune.description: A warm, sand-coloured solid effect metallic with glass flakes that sparkle like sand in the sun. Inspired by the sand dunes of Sweden's west coast, this colour adds a natural, contrasting feel.

wool_blend_breeze.description: Light, airy breeze-toned wool blend seat upholstery with studio-inspired textile materials for a fresh, Scandinavian-modern interior feel.

wool_blend_indigo.description: Peaceful deep blue wool blend seat upholstery with studio-inspired textile materials and contrasting bio-attributed Nordico for a modern, sporty look.

wool_blend_mist.description: Soft, neutral mist-toned wool blend seat upholstery with studio-inspired textile materials for a calm, minimalist Scandinavian interior.

wool_blend_pine.description: Earthy, nature-inspired pine-toned wool blend seat upholstery with studio-inspired textile materials for a grounded, natural interior feel.

EX60.recommended_for: People who value balance, practicality, family activities, weekend getaways, and longer road trips. Ideal for those seeking comfort, safety, and adaptability to varied situations and diverse needs. Often suited for households with 3-4 people or those who value quiet luxury.

21.description: The optimized 5-spoke design in machined diamond cut with the contrasting matt graphite colour gives your Volvo SUV an athletic and active expression. The lightweight design with aerodynamic inserts in glossy black contributes to optimized handling and energy efficiency.

22_matt.description: The bold 5-Y spoke design in matt black gives your Volvo SUV a commanding and modern presence. The larger diameter enhances the car’s athletic stance while the lightweight construction maintains excellent handling and energy efficiency.

22_diamond.description: The premium 5-Y spoke design combines matt black surfaces with machined diamond cut detailing for a sophisticated and technical expression. The larger 22-inch diameter gives your Volvo SUV an outstanding presence while aerodynamic design contributes to optimised energy efficiency.

ice_white.description: Bright, solid white with broken white tones that enhances the car's shape and adds intensity.

onyx_black.description: Elegant, deep black metallic with a brilliant sparkle in strong daylight and a solid darkness in reduced light.

denim_blue.description: Rich, smokey blue metallic colour with plenty of depth and a fluid, silky finish. A modern classic that works everywhere, inspired by Scandinavian fashion.

vapour_grey.description: A solid effect metallic in neutral grey with a misty touch, inspired by windswept Scandinavian limestone houses. Gives the car a light, agile look. The solid look turns to light, shimmering metallic in sunlight.

aurora_silver.description: A futuristic silver metallic with a balanced purple tint. Adds an ethereal, weightless touch while building contrasts. Sparkles with a hint of purple in sunlight.

sand_dune.description: A warm, sand-coloured solid effect metallic with glass flakes that sparkle like sand in the sun. Inspired by the sand dunes of Sweden's west coast, this colour adds a natural, contrasting feel.

forest_lake.description: Both tranquil and active, this semi-dark green metallic adds a technical hint that enhances the car’s design in a balanced way. In sunlight, it has an elegant turquoise sparkle.

heather_bronze.description: A warm and earthy metallic inspired by the heather blooming across Nordic landscapes. Its soft bronze and violet tones create a refined, natural look that subtly shifts with the light.

nordico_charcoal.description: Elegant bio-attributed charcoal Nordico seat upholstery in a charcoal interior with black headlining and contemporary decor.

nordico_cardamom.description: Elegant bio-attributed cardamom Nordico seat upholstery in a contrasting charcoal interior with black headlining and contemporary decor.

nordico_dawn.description: Stylish light-coloured bio-attributed dawn Nordico seat upholstery in a dawn interior with weathered grey ash wood decor, contrasting dark rubus base carpet and dualtone tailored steering wheel.

ventilated_nordico_cardamom.display_name: Cardamom ventilated Nordico in charcoal interior
ventilated_nordico_cardamom.description: Elegant bio-attributed cardamom Nordico seat upholstery with front seat ventilation in a contrasting charcoal interior with black headlining and weathered grey ash wood decor.

ventilated_nordico_charcoal.display_name: Charcoal ventilated Nordico in charcoal interior
ventilated_nordico_charcoal.description: Elegant bio-attributed charcoal Nordico seat upholstery with subtly contrasting piping and front seat ventilation in a charcoal interior with black headlining and weathered grey ash wood decor.

ventilated_nordico_dawn.display_name: Dawn ventilated Nordico in dawn interior
ventilated_nordico_dawn.description: Light-coloured bio-attributed dawn Nordico seat upholstery with front seat ventilation in a dawn interior with weathered grey ash wood decor, contrasting dark rubus base carpet, and a tailored dual-tone steering wheel.

wool_blend_rye.display_name: Rye tailored wool blend in dawn interior
wool_blend_rye.description: Exclusive rye tailored wool blend seat upholstery in a dawn interior with dark rubus fused ash wood decor, dark rubus base carpet and tailored dual-tone steering wheel.

EX90.recommended_for: People who value luxury, ample space, premium comfort, and safety for larger groups. Ideal for long journeys, commanding presence, and cutting-edge technology. Often suited for larger families, those who frequently transport many passengers, or anyone who desires ultimate comfort and presence.

21_8.description: This new generation aerodynamic wheels perfectly complements the bold design of your full-electric Volvo SUV. Diamond cut design with contrasting surfaces of polished aluminium and glossy black inserts create a distinctive, technical look. Aerodynamic design and innovative use of synthetic materials also help to lower air resistance and weight which gives you good conditions for optimised energy efficiency and long range.

22_5.description: This advanced, large 22-inch wheel in futuristic aerodynamic design features a multicolour insert that covers the complete wheel centre. Together with Diamond Cut design and contrasting surfaces of polished aluminium, this creates a unique look that gives your full-electric Volvo SUV an outstanding presence. Aerodynamic design and innovative use of synthetic materials also help to lower air resistance and weight which gives you good conditions for optimised energy efficiency and long range.

22_5y.display_name: 22″ 5-Y spoke glossy black diamond cut, forged
22_5y.description: Adding to the car's excellent handling as well as its distinctive look, the 22-inch 5-Y spoke glossy black diamond cut forged wheels are in a unique light-weight design that contributes to responsive driving characteristics and excellent road holding. Forging is an exclusive high-end production method where the wheel design is milled out of an aluminum blank. Compared to traditional low-pressure casting, the forged wheels have higher material properties that allow strong and low weight designs.

vapour_grey.description: A solid effect metallic in neutral grey with a misty touch, inspired by windswept Scandinavian limestone houses. Gives the car a light, agile look. The solid look turns to light, shimmering metallic in sunlight.

onyx_black.description: Elegant, deep black metallic with a brilliant sparkle in strong daylight and a solid darkness in reduced light.

crystal_white.description: Shimmering, sparkling white pearl colour built up by three layers of coat which gives a soft, deep pearlescent effect for a silky, smooth appearance and a pure exclusive look.

denim_blue.description: Rich, smokey blue metallic colour with plenty of depth and a fluid, silky finish. A modern classic that works everywhere, inspired by Scandinavian fashion.

forest_lake.description: Both tranquil and active, this semi-dark green metallic adds a technical hint that enhances the car’s design in a balanced way. In sunlight, it has an elegant turquoise sparkle.

aurora_silver.description: A futuristic silver metallic with a balanced purple tint. Adds an ethereal, weightless touch while building contrasts. Sparkles with a hint of purple in sunlight.

sand_dune.description: A warm, sand-coloured solid effect metallic with glass flakes that sparkle like sand in the sun. Inspired by the sand dunes of Sweden's west coast, this colour adds a natural, contrasting feel.

mulberry_red.description: A dark, elegant blackish red metallic inspired by Scandinavian autumn. With a calm yet dramatic feel, it sparkles up in sunlight for a colourful expression with prominent shades of red.

nordico_charcoal.description: Elegant bio-attributed Charcoal Nordico seat upholstery in a leather-free Charcoal interior with light-coloured contrasting Dawn headlining and contemporary decor for an airy, distinctive ambience.

nordico_cardamom.description: Elegant bio-attributed Cardamom Nordico seat upholstery in a leather-free, subtly contrasting Charcoal/Cardamom interior with black headlining and contemporary decor for a distinctive, timeless expression of style.

nordico_dawn.description: Light-coloured bio-attributed Dawn Nordico seat upholstery in a leather-free Dawn interior with dual-tone tailored steering wheel and contemporary decor for an airy, elegant ambience.

ventilated_nordico_cardamom.display_name: Ventilated Cardamom Nordico in Charcoal/Cardamom interior
ventilated_nordico_cardamom.description: Elegant bio-attributed Cardamom Nordico seat upholstery with ventilated front seats in a leather-free, subtly contrasting Charcoal/Cardamom interior with black headlining and contemporary decor for a distinctive, timeless expression of style.

ventilated_nordico_charcoal.display_name: Charcoal ventilated Nordico in charcoal interior
ventilated_nordico_charcoal.description: Elegant bio-attributed Charcoal Nordico seat upholstery with ventilated front seats in a leather-free Charcoal interior with light-coloured contrasting Dawn headlining and contemporary decor for an airy, distinctive ambience.

ventilated_nordico_dawn.display_name: Dawn ventilated Nordico in dawn interior
ventilated_nordico_dawn.description: Light-coloured bio-attributed Dawn Nordico seat upholstery with ventilated front seats in a leather-free Dawn interior with dual-tone tailored steering wheel and contemporary decor for an airy, elegant ambience.

wool_blend_zinc.description: Exclusive zinc-toned tailored wool blend seat upholstery in a leather-free interior with contemporary decor for a refined, natural Scandinavian ambience.
